detections.req1_text: The student shall register for the academic program to complete the enrollment process.
detections.req2_text: The system shall allow learners to sign up for the curriculum to finalize their registration.

detections.req1_text: The system shall grant guest users full access to all assessment materials.
detections.req2_text: The system shall restrict guest users from viewing any assessment materials.

detections.req2_text: The API shall retrieve the gradebook within 0.8 seconds.
